title: Flaxcrispy
description: A peppery and crispy Syrian dish featuring flaxseed that can be pressure-cooked in under an hour for a low-carb-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup (90g) flaxseed, pre-soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add cumin, black pepper, and salt; cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in flaxseed and water. Seal the pressure cooker according to manufacturer’s instructions.
Pressure-cook on high pressure for 2 minutes (adjust settings as needed).
Let steam naturally for 5-7 minutes before releasing pressure manually (be careful hot).
Remove from heat, stir in chopped parsley.
